description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small, dark, circular object is visible in the upper right quadrant. The background shows an indistinct mountain range or cloud formation. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B2
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a redacted still image from a U.S. military system to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025. The monochrome image, featuring a central crosshair, shows a small, dark, circular object in the upper right quadrant against an indistinct mountain or cloud background. The operator reported being unable to positively identify the UAP, and no accompanying mission report was provided. The timestamp visible in the image (12/31/99 18:11:27) is noted as incorrect.
reported_object_description: A small, dark, circular object, visible in a grainy, monochrome image with a central crosshair.
official_resolution: The operator was unable to positively identify the UAP.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B2 - Page 1

Black-and-white sighting photograph frame.

Visible page content:

- A central crosshair or reticle overlay with horizontal and vertical scales marked roughly from -15 to 15.
- A small dark object or mark appears slightly above and to the right of the reticle center.
- Several black redaction bars cover labels or other identifying text around the image.
- The lower-left timestamp reads: `12/31/99 18:11:27`.
- Faint terrain or mountains are visible near the lower edge of the frame.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一张来自美国军事系统的经过编辑的静态图像。该单色图像具有中央十字线，显示右上象限有一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体，背景为模糊的山脉或云层。操作员报告无法明确识别该UAP，且未提供随附任务报告。图像中可见的时间戳（12/31/99 18:11:27）被指出不正确。
reported_object_description_zh: 一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体，在带有中央十字线的颗粒状单色图像中可见。
official_resolution_zh: 操作员无法明确识别该UAP。
claims: A UAP was captured in a still image from a U.S. military system.
The image was submitted by the FBI to AARO.
The operator could not positively identify the UAP.
The timestamp on the image is incorrect.
claims_zh: 一个UAP被美国军事系统的静态图像捕获。
该图像由联邦调查局提交给AARO。
操作员无法明确识别该UAP。
图像上的时间戳不正确。
